title: A Review - Thermal spraying on Polymers
authors: Niyati Lia
abstract: Polymer coatings are extensively used to enhance the surface performance of engineering components by imparting corrosion resistance, wear protection, hydrophobicity, biocompatibility, and various functional surface properties. Among the available deposition techniques, thermal spray technologies have emerged as versatile and efficient methods for producing polymer and polymer-based composite coatings on metallic, ceramic, and polymeric substrates. These processes enable the fabrication of thick, adherent coatings while minimizing substrate degradation and offering flexibility in material selection.This review presents a comprehensive overview of thermally sprayed polymer coatings, with emphasis on deposition processes, coating microstructure, mechanical and functional properties, and major application areas. It also discusses the characteristics and suitability of commonly employed polymers, including polyethylene (PE), polyamide (PA), polyimide (PI), polyurethane (PU), polyether ether ketone (PEEK), polyethylene terephthalate (PET), and fluoropolymers. Furthermore, the review critically examines the fabrication and performance of polymer and polymer-based composite coatings produced using various thermal spray techniques, such as flame spraying, high-velocity oxy-fuel (HVOF) spraying, plasma spraying (PS), and cold spraying (CS). The advantages, limitations, recent advancements, and future research directions of these techniques are also highlighted to provide a comprehensive understanding of their potential in advanced surface engineering applications.
venue: Zenodo (CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research)

infographic.key_insight: Thermal spray methods can produce thick, adherent polymer and polymer-composite coatings that improve surface functions such as corrosion resistance, wear protection, hydrophobicity, and biocompatibility.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The review shows that thermal spraying is a versatile route for adding polymer-based surface functionality to metallic, ceramic, and polymeric components without excessive substrate damage.
method: Compare flame spraying, HVOF, plasma spraying, and cold spraying for polymer deposition
Assess common polymers such as PE, PA, PI, PU, PEEK, PET, and fluoropolymers
Relate process choice to coating microstructure, adhesion, and functional performance
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper is a review synthesis based on reported deposition processes, coating characteristics, and application outcomes rather than a new experimental dataset.
infographic.watch_item: Polymer thermal spraying must manage heat-sensitive materials carefully to avoid degradation and to maintain coating integrity and adhesion.
infographic.paper_title: A Review - Thermal spraying on Polymers

zh-Hans.title: 聚合物热喷涂综述
zh-Hans.abstract: 聚合物涂层被广泛用于提升工程构件的表面性能，赋予其耐腐蚀性、耐磨保护、疏水性、生物相容性以及多种功能性表面特性。在现有沉积技术中，热喷涂技术已成为在金属、陶瓷和聚合物基底上制备聚合物及聚合物基复合涂层的多功能且高效的方法。这些工艺能够制备厚而具有良好附着力的涂层，同时尽量减少基底劣化，并在材料选择上提供灵活性。本综述对热喷涂聚合物涂层进行了全面概述，重点关注沉积工艺、涂层微观结构、力学与功能性能以及主要应用领域。综述还讨论了常用聚合物的特性及适用性，包括聚乙烯（PE）、聚酰胺（PA）、聚酰亚胺（PI）、聚氨酯（PU）、聚醚醚酮（PEEK）、聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯（PET）和氟聚合物。此外，本文批判性地考察了采用多种热喷涂技术制备的聚合物及聚合物基复合涂层的制备与性能，例如火焰喷涂、高速氧燃料（HVOF）喷涂、等离子喷涂（PS）和冷喷涂（CS）。文中还强调了这些技术的优势、局限性、最新进展和未来研究方向，以便对其在先进表面工程应用中的潜力形成全面认识。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂方法能够制备厚而具有良好附着力的聚合物及聚合物复合涂层，从而改善耐腐蚀性、耐磨保护、疏水性和生物相容性等表面功能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该综述表明，热喷涂是一条多功能途径，可在不过度损伤基底的情况下，为金属、陶瓷和聚合物构件赋予基于聚合物的表面功能。
method: 比较火焰喷涂、HVOF、等离子喷涂和冷喷涂在聚合物沉积中的适用性
评估PE、PA、PI、PU、PEEK、PET及氟聚合物等常见聚合物
将工艺选择与涂层微观结构、附着力和功能性能联系起来
infographic.evidence_signal: 本文是一篇基于已报道的沉积工艺、涂层特征和应用结果的综述性综合，而非新的实验数据集。
infographic.watch_item: 聚合物热喷涂必须谨慎控制热敏材料，以避免降解并保持涂层完整性和附着力。

infographic.engineering_relevance: These coatings can improve corrosion resistance, wear behavior, hydrophobicity, and biocompatibility for advanced surface engineering in industrial and biomedical components.
method: Surveyed major thermal spray routes for polymers: flame spraying, HVOF, plasma spraying, and cold spraying.
Compared common polymers and composites including PE, PA, PI, PU, PEEK, PET, and fluoropolymers.
Reviewed relationships among process choice, microstructure, and coating performance across applications.

zh-Hans.title: 聚合物热喷涂综述
zh-Hans.abstract: 聚合物涂层被广泛用于通过赋予耐腐蚀性、抗磨损保护、疏水性、生物相容性以及多种功能性表面特性来提升工程构件的表面性能。在可用的沉积技术中，热喷涂技术已成为在金属、陶瓷和聚合物基体上制备聚合物及基于聚合物的复合涂层的多功能且高效的方法。这些工艺能够在尽量减小基体退化的同时制备厚实、具有良好附着力的涂层，并在材料选择上提供灵活性。本综述对热喷涂聚合物涂层进行了全面概述，重点介绍沉积工艺、涂层微观结构、力学与功能特性以及主要应用领域。文中还讨论了常用聚合物的特性及适用性，包括聚乙烯（PE）、聚酰胺（PA）、聚酰亚胺（PI）、聚氨酯（PU）、聚醚醚酮（PEEK）、聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯（PET）以及氟聚合物。此外，综述还对采用多种热喷涂技术制备的聚合物及聚合物基复合涂层的制备与性能进行了批判性分析，这些技术包括火焰喷涂、高速氧燃料（HVOF）喷涂、等离子喷涂（PS）和冷喷涂（CS）。同时，文中还突出介绍了这些技术的优势、局限性、最新进展以及未来研究方向，以便全面理解其在先进表面工程应用中的潜力。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂可在多种基体上沉积耐久的聚合物及聚合物复合涂层，并可调控其防护与功能特性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这些涂层可提升工业和生物医学构件的耐腐蚀性、耐磨行为、疏水性和生物相容性，从而服务于先进表面工程。
method: 调查了聚合物热喷涂的主要路线：火焰喷涂、HVOF、等离子喷涂和冷喷涂。
比较了包括PE、PA、PI、PU、PEEK、PET和氟聚合物在内的常见聚合物及复合材料。
综述了不同应用中工艺选择、微观结构与涂层性能之间的关系。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该综述综合了已发表研究成果，而非报道新的实验，重点关注沉积方法、涂层性能和应用结果。
infographic.watch_item: 聚合物热喷涂可能受基体热敏感性以及工艺相关的降解或附着问题限制，需谨慎控制。

title: Thermal-Mechanical Analysis of Residual Stress and Deformation in 6082 Aluminum Alloy Welded Joints
authors: Yingqi Cao
abstract: Welding residual stress and deformation have a significant impact on the welded structure and service performance of aluminum alloys. The three-dimensional temperature-displacement coupling of 6082 aluminum alloy butt welding joints was established by using ABAQUS software, and the residual stress distribution and deformation behavior during the welding process were studied. First, transient thermal analysis is conducted to obtain the temperature distribution during the welding process. Then, the obtained temperature field is introduced into mechanical analysis to evaluate the residual stress and structural deformation caused by welding. The results show that the temperature in the weld zone is the highest and gradually decreases towards the base material, with a distinct temperature gradient. During the thermal cycling process of welding, due to uneven thermal expansion and contraction, significant residual stress is concentrated in the weld seam and heat-affected zone. In addition, obvious deformation was observed near the welding area. The established numerical model provides a valuable basis for understanding the thermodynamic behavior of welded aluminum alloy structures and can offer references for the optimization of welding processes and structural design.

infographic.key_insight: A 3D thermal-mechanical ABAQUS model shows that 6082 aluminum alloy welds develop the highest temperatures in the weld zone and concentrated residual stress and deformation around the weld seam and heat-affected zone.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study helps predict weld-induced stress and distortion, supporting better process optimization and structural design for aluminum alloy joints.
method: Built a 3D temperature-displacement coupled model in ABAQUS for butt welding joints
Ran transient thermal analysis to compute the welding temperature field
Used the temperature field in mechanical analysis to estimate residual stress and deformation
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports a clear thermal gradient, stress concentration in the weld/HAZ, and observable deformation near the welding area from the simulation results.
infographic.watch_item: The abstract describes a numerical simulation only, so validation against experimental temperature, stress, or distortion measurements is not stated.
infographic.paper_title: Thermal-Mechanical Analysis of Residual Stress and Deformation in 6082 Aluminum Alloy Welded Joints

zh-Hans.title: 6082铝合金焊接接头残余应力与变形的热-机械分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接残余应力和变形对铝合金焊接结构及服役性能具有显著影响。采用ABAQUS软件建立了6082铝合金对接焊接接头的三维温度-位移耦合模型，并研究了焊接过程中残余应力分布和变形行为。首先，进行瞬态热分析以获得焊接过程中的温度分布。然后，将所得温度场引入力学分析中，评估焊接引起的残余应力和结构变形。结果表明，焊缝区域温度最高，并向母材方向逐渐降低，具有明显的温度梯度。在焊接热循环过程中，由于热膨胀和收缩不均匀，显著的残余应力集中在焊缝和热影响区。此外，在焊接区域附近观察到明显变形。所建立的数值模型为理解焊接铝合金结构的热力学行为提供了有价值的基础，并可为焊接工艺优化和结构设计提供参考。

infographic.key_insight: 三维热-机械ABAQUS模型表明，6082铝合金焊接接头在焊缝区域产生最高温度，并且焊缝及热影响区周围出现集中的残余应力和变形。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究有助于预测焊接引起的应力和变形，从而支持铝合金接头更好的工艺优化和结构设计。
method: 在ABAQUS中建立了用于对接焊接接头的三维温度-位移耦合模型
进行了瞬态热分析以计算焊接温度场
将温度场用于力学分析以估算残余应力和变形
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要中的仿真结果报告了清晰的热梯度、焊缝/热影响区的应力集中，以及焊接区域附近可观察到的变形。
infographic.watch_item: 摘要描述的仅为数值模拟，未说明是否通过实验温度、应力或变形测量进行验证。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: High-velocity air-fuel spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and usable shape-memory behavior after annealing.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical route to functional NiTi surface layers on steel components for wear-resistant, thermally active, or adaptive coatings.
method: NiTi coatings were deposited on mild steel by HVAF spray using four different parameter sets.
Coatings were characterized for composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation, and thermomechanical response.
Post-spray annealing was used to recover functional shape-memory behavior.
infographic.evidence_signal: The coated samples were 100–300 μm thick and were evaluated by microstructure/phase analysis plus bending, nanoindentation, and scratch tests, which showed thermal actuation and shape-memory effects.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings are microstructurally inhomogeneous and defect-rich, so annealing and careful process control are needed to obtain reliable functional performance.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提升其耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护性能，已是一种标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可作为硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层由于具有独特的功能性热机械特性，还带来额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直较为困难。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最常用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀且不能发生马氏体转变的涂层，而冷喷NiTi涂层则与基体的结合性较差。本工作报道了首次成功制备出兼具功能性热机械性能且同时与基体具有很好附着性的厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um）。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上以四组不同工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能性热机械性能进行了评估。尽管涂层含有不均匀的显微组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但其在冷却和/或机械加载过程中仍会发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要经过退火才能表现出功能性热机械性能。尽管其抗拉强度有限，涂层仍在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: 高速空气燃料喷涂能够制备厚NiTi涂层，且在退火后可保留马氏体转变和可用的形状记忆行为。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为钢制构件上的功能性NiTi表层提供了一条实用途径，可用于耐磨、热响应或自适应涂层。
method: 采用HVAF喷涂，在低碳钢上以四组不同工艺参数沉积NiTi涂层。
对涂层的成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变和热机械响应进行表征。
通过喷涂后退火恢复功能性形状记忆行为。
infographic.evidence_signal: 制备的涂层厚度为100–300 μm，并通过显微组织/相分析以及弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕试验进行评估，结果显示出热致驱动和形状记忆效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层在显微组织上不均匀且缺陷丰富，因此需要退火和精细的工艺控制，以获得可靠的功能性能。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet predicts laser-weld penetration with high accuracy by combining physics-informed self-supervised learning and few-shot classification.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method reduces dependence on large labeled datasets, making automated quality control for laser welding more practical in industrial settings.
method: Use a PINN-guided contrastive self-supervised encoder to learn physically meaningful molten-pool and keyhole features from unlabeled images.
Apply three image augmentation tasks to improve representation robustness and generalization.
Use prototypical-network few-shot learning to classify penetration state from only a small labeled set.
infographic.evidence_signal: The model reached 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the unlabeled data, physics priors, and the welding setup used for training.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于物理信息神经网络的自监督学习激光焊接过程熔深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔深状态对于保证焊接质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，这是一种新型算法，仅使用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类准确率。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；由于其依赖大量高质量标注数据，在工业应用中受到制约。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），该模型被引导从大量未标注数据中提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，同时三个图像增强任务进一步提升其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像构建类别表征，实现稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，与使用整个标注数据集的传统监督学习算法性能相当。该工作提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 通过结合物理信息自监督学习和少样本分类，以高准确率预测激光焊接熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法降低了对大规模标注数据集的依赖，使激光焊接的自动化质量控制在工业场景中更加可行。
method: 使用由 PINN 引导的对比式自监督编码器，从未标注图像中学习具有物理意义的熔池和小孔特征。
应用三种图像增强任务以提高表征鲁棒性和泛化能力。
使用原型网络少样本学习，仅依靠少量标注集对熔深状态进行分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型仅使用 200 张标注图像，即约占标注数据集的 5%，便达到 96.06% 的分类准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于未标注数据、物理先验以及用于训练的焊接设置的质量和代表性。

title: Analysis of the Influence of Laser Welding Parameters on the Quality of the Lap Joint
authors: Z. Saternus, W. Piekarska, Tomasz Domański, Ján Vavro, M. Kubiak, Pavol Čerňava
abstract: The analysis presented focuses on the relationship between laser welding parameters and the strength properties of lap joints. The objective of the research was to design a numerical model for estimating the strength properties of lap joints welded by laser beam. As part of the work, experimental tests were carried out and then numerical simulations were performed. Experimental tests were performed for a lap joint welded using two different welding depths. A joint with full and partial penetration of materials was obtained. The material used for the lap joint is two flat bars with dimensions of 100x200x2 [mm] made of X5CrNi18-10 austenitic steel. Mechanical strength measurements and macroscopic studies were performed to identify the properties of the lap joint. To identify the properties of the lap joint, mechanical strength tests and macroscopic examinations were conducted. Based on experimental studies, discrete models of the analyzed lap joints were developed in the Abaqus FEM program. Simulation calculations of the laser welding process were performed. The obtained simulation results were input data for further numerical strength analysis. To validate the numerical models, the results obtained were compared with experimental data.

infographic.key_insight: Laser welding depth strongly affects lap-joint strength, and a calibrated FEM workflow can estimate joint quality from the welding parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study provides a practical route to predict and tune laser welding settings for improving the load-bearing performance of stainless-steel lap joints.
method: Built lap-joint specimens from X5CrNi18-10 steel plates.
Performed laser welding with both partial and full penetration.
Combined mechanical testing, macroscopic inspection, and Abaqus FEM simulations to validate the numerical model.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports experimental tests on two welding depths and compares simulation results against measured strength and macroscopic observations.
infographic.watch_item: The model is validated on a specific material, geometry, and two penetration cases, so broader process transferability may require additional calibration.
infographic.paper_title: Analysis of the Influence of Laser Welding Parameters on the Quality of the Lap Joint

zh-Hans.title: 激光焊接参数对搭接接头质量影响的分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 所提出的分析重点关注激光焊接参数与搭接接头强度性能之间的关系。该研究的目标是建立一个用于估算由激光束焊接的搭接接头强度性能的数值模型。作为研究的一部分，进行了实验测试，随后开展了数值模拟。实验测试针对采用两种不同焊接深度焊接的搭接接头进行。获得了材料全熔透和部分熔透的接头。搭接接头所用材料为两块尺寸为100x200x2 [mm]的平板，材料为X5CrNi18-10奥氏体钢。为识别搭接接头的性能，进行了机械强度测量和宏观研究。为识别搭接接头的性能，进行了机械强度试验和宏观检验。基于实验研究，在Abaqus FEM程序中建立了所分析搭接接头的离散模型。对激光焊接过程进行了仿真计算。获得的仿真结果作为进一步数值强度分析的输入数据。为验证数值模型，将获得的结果与实验数据进行了比较。

infographic.key_insight: 激光焊接深度会显著影响搭接接头强度，而经过标定的FEM流程可根据焊接参数估算接头质量。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究为预测和调整激光焊接设定、以提高不锈钢搭接接头承载性能提供了一条实用路径。
method: 采用X5CrNi18-10钢板制备搭接接头试样。
采用激光焊接实现部分熔透和全熔透两种焊接。
结合机械测试、宏观检查和Abaqus FEM仿真验证数值模型。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了针对两种焊接深度的实验测试，并将仿真结果与实测强度和宏观观察进行了比较。
infographic.watch_item: 该模型仅针对特定材料、几何形状和两种熔透情况进行了验证，因此更广泛的工艺迁移可能需要额外标定。

title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene
authors: A. Alhourani, I. Barsoum, J. Sheikh-Ahmad, S. Deveci
abstract: Friction stir welding (FSW) has gained recognition as an effective technique for joining thermoplastic materials. This study presents a comprehensive investigation to predict FSW characteristics such as weld temperatures, vertical axial forces, material flow and defect formation in FSW of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) using both computational and machine learning approaches, validated by experimental results. A three-dimensional Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) numerical model is developed to simulate the HDPE welding process under varying process parameters of rotational and welding speeds, and bottom preheating conditions. The CEL numerical model is validated against experimental data, showing markedly good agreement in predicting void formation, thermal and mechanical responses. Results indicate that preheating the bottom surface proved effective in reducing thermal gradients and stabilizing vertical force fluctuations. Quantitatively, bottom-surface preheating at 60 °C reduced peak plunge force from 1600 N close to 1100 N and raised peak temperatures from 70 °C (without preheat) to about 100 °C, hence smoothing through-thickness gradients and stabilizing the axial force distribution. In parallel, two multilayer perceptron artificial neural networks (ANNs) are trained on experimental data to predict temporal temperature and axial force responses with R2 between 0.91 and 0.99, demonstrating high accuracy and strong generalization across the tested FSW parameter space. The computational CEL simulations accurately predicted weld zone morphology, including stir zone, thermo-mechanically affected zone and heat-affected zone, however the combined CEL–ANN framework enables rapid generation of process maps that highlights defective and defect-free welding windows, with optimal conditions obtained at 1500 rpm and 30 mm/min with 60 °C preheating, and poor weldability observed at 1000 rpm without preheating due to wormhole formation. These findings provide process-driven design guidelines for developing robust HDPE joints and demonstrate how integrating computational modeling with machine learning enables efficient optimization, offering valuable insights into the key characteristics of the FSW process in thermoplastics and supporting its broader adoption in industrial applications.

infographic.key_insight: A combined CEL simulation and ANN model can accurately predict weld temperature, axial force, and defect formation in HDPE friction stir welding, enabling fast process-window optimization.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Bottom-surface preheating significantly improves weld stability by reducing thermal gradients and lowering plunge-force peaks, supporting more robust thermoplastic joint design.
method: 3D coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) model of FSW under varied rotational speed, welding speed, and preheating
Two multilayer perceptron ANNs trained on experimental data to predict temperature and axial force histories
Validation against experiments and process-map generation for defect-free vs defective welding windows
infographic.evidence_signal: The ANN models achieved strong predictive performance with R2 values between 0.91 and 0.99, and the CEL model matched experimental trends in void formation, thermal response, and force response.
infographic.watch_item: The process map is based on the tested HDPE setup and parameter range, so broader use on other tool geometries, polymers, or larger process spaces will need additional validation.
infographic.paper_title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene

zh-Hans.title: 用于高密度聚乙烯搅拌摩擦焊焊接质量预测的计算与机器学习建模方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 搅拌摩擦焊（FSW）已被公认为一种连接热塑性材料的有效技术。本研究采用计算方法与机器学习方法，并结合实验结果验证，对高密度聚乙烯（HDPE）搅拌摩擦焊中的焊缝温度、竖直轴向力、材料流动和缺陷形成等FSW特征进行了系统研究。建立了三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）数值模型，用于在不同工艺参数——转速、焊接速度以及底面预热条件——下模拟HDPE焊接过程。CEL数值模型经实验数据验证，在预测空洞形成、热响应和力学响应方面表现出明显良好的一致性。结果表明，对底表面进行预热可有效降低热梯度并稳定竖直力波动。定量而言，底表面在60 °C下预热使峰值压入力从接近1600 N降至约1100 N，并将峰值温度从70 °C（未预热）提高到约100 °C，从而平缓了厚度方向梯度并稳定了轴向力分布。与此同时，基于实验数据训练了两个多层感知机人工神经网络（ANN），用于预测温度和轴向力的时序响应，其R2介于0.91至0.99之间，表明在所测试的FSW参数空间内具有很高的准确性和良好的泛化能力。计算CEL模拟能够准确预测焊缝区形貌，包括搅拌区、热-力影响区和热影响区；然而，CEL–ANN联合框架可快速生成工艺图，标示出有缺陷和无缺陷的焊接窗口。最优条件为1500 rpm和30 mm/min，并采用60 °C预热；而在1000 rpm且未预热条件下，由于虫洞形成而表现出较差的可焊性。这些发现为开发稳健的HDPE接头提供了以工艺为驱动的设计指南，并展示了将计算建模与机器学习相结合如何实现高效优化，为理解热塑性材料FSW过程的关键特征提供了有价值的见解，并支持其在工业应用中的更广泛采用。

infographic.key_insight: 结合CEL模拟与ANN模型可准确预测HDPE搅拌摩擦焊中的焊接温度、轴向力和缺陷形成，从而实现快速工艺窗口优化。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 底表面预热通过降低热梯度和压入力峰值，显著提升焊接稳定性，支持更稳健的热塑性材料接头设计。
method: 在不同转速、焊接速度和预热条件下建立FSW的三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）模型
基于实验数据训练两个多层感知机ANN，以预测温度和轴向力历史
通过实验验证并生成工艺图，用于区分无缺陷与有缺陷的焊接窗口
infographic.evidence_signal: ANN模型的预测性能较强，R2值介于0.91至0.99之间；CEL模型与空洞形成、热响应和力响应的实验趋势吻合良好。
infographic.watch_item: 该工艺图基于所测试的HDPE装置和参数范围，因此在其他工具几何形状、聚合物或更大工艺空间上的推广还需要额外验证。

title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
authors: Ata Jahangir Moshayedi, Amir Sohail Khan, Ming Jun Zhang, Shuxin Yang, David Bassir
abstract: Weld defect detection plays a central role in pipeline inspection because it directly influences structural reliability and operational safety.Conventional manual inspection methods suffer from several limitations, including high labor demands, subjective judgment, and inconsistent results, which restrict their effectiveness in large-scale industrial applications. To overcome these challenges, this study evaluates the use of the lightweight convolutional neural network MobileNetV3, considering both its Small and Large configurations, for automatic multi-class classification of pipeline weld defects.The proposed approach integrates image preprocessing and data augmentation with a lightweight deep learning architecture to extract discriminative visual features from weld images. Experimental validation is carried out using two datasets acquired under practical inspection conditions. The AI5083 dataset contains 4,927 images captured using HDR cameras, while the PWDID dataset includes 78 images collected with a mobile phone camera in uncontrolled environments.The experimental results demonstrate strong classification performance, achieving an accuracy of 99.99% on the AI5083 dataset and improved results on the PWDID dataset. Compared with previously reported methods, the proposed approach yields an accuracy improvement of approximately 3%, indicating its robustness across different acquisition settings. In addition to its high accuracy, MobileNetV3 offers fast inference, low memory consumption, and reduced power requirements. Owing to these characteristics and ias compatibility with deployment frameworks such as TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML, MobileNetV3 is well suited for mobile and handheld inspection tools. Based on these findings, the use of MobileNetV3 and other modern lightweight architectures along with denoised function are recommended for practical, on device pipeline weld defect inspection systems.

infographic.key_insight: MobileNetV3 can accurately classify pipeline weld defects from noisy RGB images while remaining lightweight enough for on-device inspection.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method supports faster, lower-power, and more portable weld inspection workflows, making automated quality control more practical in field conditions.
method: Preprocess and augment weld images to improve robustness to noisy acquisition conditions.
Train and compare MobileNetV3-Small and MobileNetV3-Large for multi-class defect classification.
Target deployment on mobile/handheld platforms via TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML.
infographic.evidence_signal: The study was evaluated on two practical datasets: AI5083 with 4,927 HDR-captured images and PWDID with 78 mobile-phone images, achieving 99.99% accuracy on AI5083 and about a 3% improvement over prior methods.
infographic.watch_item: Performance on the smaller, uncontrolled PWDID dataset may be less stable, so broader validation across more real-world inspection conditions is still needed.
infographic.paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images

zh-Hans.title: 用于管道焊接缺陷检测的 MobileNetV3：针对含噪 RGB 图像的计算机视觉方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接缺陷检测在管道检测中占据核心地位，因为它直接影响结构可靠性和运行安全。传统的人工检测方法存在多种局限，包括劳动强度高、判断主观性强以及结果不一致，这些问题限制了其在大规模工业应用中的有效性。为克服这些挑战，本研究评估了轻量级卷积神经网络 MobileNetV3 的应用，考察其 Small 和 Large 两种配置，用于管道焊缝缺陷的自动多类别分类。所提出的方法将图像预处理和数据增强与轻量级深度学习架构相结合，以从焊缝图像中提取具有判别性的视觉特征。实验验证基于两个在实际检测条件下获取的数据集进行。AI5083 数据集包含 4,927 张使用 HDR 相机拍摄的图像，而 PWDID 数据集包含 78 张在非受控环境下使用手机相机采集的图像。实验结果表明，该方法具有很强的分类性能，在 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并在 PWDID 数据集上取得了改进结果。与先前报道的方法相比，该方法的准确率提升约 3%，表明其在不同采集条件下具有较好的鲁棒性。除了高准确率之外，MobileNetV3 还具有推理速度快、内存占用低和功耗要求较低等优点。由于这些特性以及其与 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 等部署框架的兼容性，MobileNetV3 非常适用于移动式和手持式检测工具。基于这些发现，建议在实际的端侧管道焊接缺陷检测系统中采用 MobileNetV3 及其他现代轻量级架构，并结合去噪功能。

infographic.key_insight: MobileNetV3 能够从含噪 RGB 图像中准确分类管道焊接缺陷，同时保持足够轻量，适合端侧检测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法支持更快、低功耗且更便携的焊缝检测流程，使自动化质量控制在现场条件下更具可行性。
method: 对焊缝图像进行预处理和数据增强，以提高对噪声采集条件的鲁棒性。
训练并比较 MobileNetV3-Small 和 MobileNetV3-Large 在多类别缺陷分类中的表现。
通过 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 面向移动/手持平台部署。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该研究在两个实际数据集上进行了评估：AI5083 包含 4,927 张 HDR 采集图像，PWDID 包含 78 张手机拍摄图像；在 AI5083 上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并较先前方法提升约 3%。
infographic.watch_item: 由于在较小且非受控的 PWDID 数据集上的性能可能更不稳定，因此仍需在更多真实世界检测条件下进行更广泛的验证。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network can jointly predict penetration state, penetration depth, and weld seam morphology from in-process weld pool images and welding parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables real-time in-situ quality control for laser welding, reducing reliance on post-process inspection while improving process stability and defect avoidance.
method: CMOS camera captures top weld pool images during welding.
CNN + state-space model extracts spatial and temporal features from images plus welding parameters.
A carefully constructed dataset improves robustness and generalization for multi-task prediction.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and coverage of the training dataset, so generalization to new materials, geometries, or welding regimes should be verified before deployment.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接中熔深与形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在决定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文系统介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。监测平台依赖于在激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像以及焊接参数中提取的时空特征进行融合，构建了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝截面重构准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统中的在线质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度神经网络可基于过程中的熔池图像和焊接参数，联合预测熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使激光焊接能够实现实时在线质量控制，减少对后处理检测的依赖，同时提高工艺稳定性并避免缺陷。
method: CMOS相机在焊接过程中采集顶部熔池图像。
CNN + 状态空间模型从图像及焊接参数中提取空间和时间特征。
精心构建的数据集提升了多任务预测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79 mm的熔深误差以及95.65%的截面重构准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于训练数据集的质量和覆盖范围，因此在部署前应验证其对新材料、几何形状或焊接工艺条件的泛化能力。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning update to BiSeNetV2 with a hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss makes seam segmentation much more robust to reflective welding surfaces without increasing model complexity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method improves real-time robotic welding perception in construction, where thin seams and specular glare can cause critical segmentation failures.
method: Start from a BiSeNetV2 backbone and apply transfer learning for seam segmentation.
Use a hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss to improve boundary quality and overlap stability.
Keep the architecture lightweight so FLOPs, parameters, and inference speed remain unchanged.
infographic.evidence_signal: The proposed method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline and recovering 96.33% of severe zero-IoU failures.
infographic.watch_item: The gains appear strongest under reflective conditions, so deployment should still be validated on diverse weld geometries, lighting setups, and camera positions.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强用于建筑自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：解决双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 可靠的焊缝分割对于建筑场景中的自主机器人焊接至关重要，因为恶劣光照、镜面反射以及细窄焊缝几何形状常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出了一种抗反射焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失来增强 BiSeNetV2 骨干网络。与增加网络结构复杂度不同，所提出的框架通过面向学习稳定性的优化提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法取得了 81.76\% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73\% 的 mIoU，在保持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度完全相同的前提下，相比基于 OHEM 的基线将 Joint IoU 提高了 +22.36 个百分点。所提出的方法还恢复了反射条件下 96.33\% 的严重零 IoU 失败样本。对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，该优化策略对轻量级实时分割架构尤为有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些发现表明，所提出的框架为涉及反射性金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量级的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 对 BiSeNetV2 进行基于迁移学习的更新，并配合混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失，可在不增加模型复杂度的情况下显著提升焊缝分割对反射焊接表面的鲁棒性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法提升了建筑场景中的实时机器人焊接感知能力，因为细焊缝和镜面眩光可能导致严重的分割失败。
method: 从 BiSeNetV2 骨干网络出发，并对焊缝分割应用迁移学习。
使用混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失，以改善边界质量和重叠稳定性。
保持架构轻量化，使 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度保持不变。
infographic.evidence_signal: 所提出的方法达到了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，相比 OHEM 基线将 Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点，并恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失败样本。
infographic.watch_item: 这些提升似乎在反射条件下最为显著，因此在不同焊缝几何形状、光照设置和相机位置下仍应进行部署验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source domain expansion enables robust weld penetration state prediction across fundamentally different welding processes, including TIG and laser welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This reduces the need to relabel new process data and supports transferable intelligent monitoring for multi-process welding systems.
method: Train a UDA model to align source and target feature distributions without target labels.
Use gradual source domain expansion to improve adaptation stability across process shifts.
Evaluate same-process and cross-process penetration classification on dedicated TIG and laser datasets.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method achieved 90.65% and 90.72% average accuracy in same-process tests, and 80.48% TIG→Laser plus 81.13% Laser→TIG in cross-process transfer, outperforming the supervised baseline by about 35–43% absolute.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on the quality and representativeness of the source and target welding datasets, and adaptation may still be sensitive when process physics differ strongly or data are scarce.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光焊和TIG焊中无监督域适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在物理机制显著不同的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到以小孔效应为基础的激光焊，其性能往往会因域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一限制，我们提出了一种结合渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督域适应（UDA）框架。该方法在专用的TIG和激光焊数据集上进行评估，在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，它在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督基线分别提高35.83%和38.87%。更重要的是，在跨工艺场景中，TIG到Laser的准确率达到80.48%，Laser到TIG的准确率达到81.13%，相较基线分别提升43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持可分类别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了跨不同焊接系统的智能监测通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督域适应框架，能够在包括TIG焊和激光焊在内的本质上不同的焊接工艺之间，实现稳健的焊缝熔深状态预测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这减少了对新工艺数据重新标注的需求，并支持面向多工艺焊接系统的可迁移智能监测。
method: 训练UDA模型，在没有目标域标签的情况下对齐源域与目标域的特征分布。
采用渐进式源域扩展，提高跨工艺迁移中的适应稳定性。
在专用TIG和激光焊数据集上评估同工艺与跨工艺的熔深分类性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法在同工艺测试中的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，在跨工艺迁移中TIG→Laser达到80.48%、Laser→TIG达到81.13%，较监督基线提升约35%–43%的绝对准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能取决于源域和目标域焊接数据集的质量与代表性；当工艺物理机制差异较大或数据稀缺时，适应效果仍可能对这些因素较为敏感。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 D-gun coating substantially improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V by promoting a protective tribo-layer, and machine learning can predict wear from test conditions.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This shows how detonation-sprayed ceramic coatings can extend the service life of titanium alloys in aerospace, biomedical, and marine tribological components.
method: Applied Al2O3-TiO2 coating to Ti-6Al-4V using detonation gun spraying under controlled parameters.
Evaluated wear with pin-on-disc testing per ASTM G99 across 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min against EN31 steel.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that random forest had the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error, and SEM showed reduced wear with tribo-layer formation on coated surfaces.
infographic.watch_item: The model appears trained on a limited experimental window, so predictions may not generalize well outside the tested load, speed, and duration ranges.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，考察了Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学行为。采用受控条件下的爆炸喷涂枪（D-gun）工艺，在Ti-6Al-4V合金上制备了厚度约200 µm的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷涂距离：180 mm，颗粒速度约1200 m/s）。按照ASTM G99标准，使用销-盘试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验在40–100 N法向载荷、100–200 rpm滑动速度以及20–40 min持续时间条件下进行，对偶材料为EN31钢。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面的磨损减轻，并形成了保护性的摩擦膜。建立了人工神经网络、K近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，用于基于滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林在平均百分误差和均方误差更低方面表现最佳。结果表明，D-gun沉积的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了Ti-6Al-4V的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: 约200 µm的Al2O3-TiO2 D-gun涂层通过促进形成保护性摩擦膜，显著提高了Ti-6Al-4V的耐磨性，且机器学习可根据试验条件预测磨损。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明，爆炸喷涂陶瓷涂层可延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋摩擦学部件中钛合金的服役寿命。
method: 在受控参数下，采用爆炸喷涂枪工艺将Al2O3-TiO2涂层施加到Ti-6Al-4V上。
按照ASTM G99，通过销-盘试验评估磨损，条件包括40–100 N、100–200 rpm和20–40 min，对偶材料为EN31钢。
建立ANN、KNN和随机森林模型，根据滑动条件预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告随机森林具有最低的平均百分误差和均方误差，且SEM显示涂层表面磨损减轻并形成了摩擦膜。
infographic.watch_item: 该模型似乎仅在有限的实验窗口内训练，因此超出所测试的载荷、速度和持续时间范围时，预测结果可能泛化性不佳。

title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings
authors: Xinran Li, Yi-Xiang Wang, Maxingwang Lu, Yongchao Fang
abstract: To solve the susceptibility of TC4 titanium alloys to high-temperature oxidation and subsequent performance degradation, AlCuFe quasicrystalline (QC) coatings were successfully fabricated via detonation spraying (DS) as a functional protective barrier. The oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and mechanical stability of the coating system were systematically investigated at 450°C in an atmospheric environment for up to 250 h. The results indicate that the oxidation kinetics strictly obey the parabolic growth law, yielding a steady-state parabolic rate constant ( k p ) of 1.83 × 10 −2 mg 2 ⋅ cm −4 ⋅ h −1 . Throughout the service period, the coating exhibits a significant “thermal hardening” effect, with the surface microhardness increasing from an initial 491 HV 0.2 to a final value of 665.2 HV 0.2 (a 35.5% increment). Phase evolution is characterized by an initial thermally induced ordering of metastable regions (0–3 h) followed by the gradual decomposition of the icosahedral (I) phase into approximant phases (β, τ, and λ) driven by the Al-depletion effect. Notably, the increased density of phase boundaries and intermetallic interfaces within the multi-phase network effectively sustains the mechanical performance despite the decline in the primary QC fraction. This study demonstrates that DS-AlCuFe coatings provide a reliable structural evolution pathway for the long-term high-temperature protection of titanium alloys.

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings oxidize slowly at 450°C and evolve into a stronger multiphase structure that helps preserve protection over time.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The coating offers a promising thermal-barrier option for TC4 titanium alloys exposed to long-term high-temperature service.
method: Fabricated AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings by detonation spraying.
Aged/oxidized the coatings in air at 450°C for up to 250 h.
Tracked oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and microhardness changes over time.
infographic.evidence_signal: The oxidation followed a parabolic law with kp = 1.83 × 10^-2 mg^2·cm^-4·h^-1, while microhardness increased from 491 HV0.2 to 665.2 HV0.2 after 250 h.
infographic.watch_item: The beneficial hardening comes with phase decomposition of the primary quasicrystal, so coating performance may depend on controlling Al depletion and phase-boundary stability.
infographic.paper_title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆轰喷涂 AlCuFe 近晶体涂层的高温氧化动力学与微观结构演化
zh-Hans.abstract: 为解决 TC4 钛合金易发生高温氧化并导致后续性能劣化的问题，采用爆轰喷涂（DS）成功制备了 AlCuFe 近晶体（QC）涂层，作为一种功能性防护屏障。在 450°C、大气环境下对该涂层体系的氧化动力学、相演化及力学稳定性进行了系统研究，持续时间最长达 250 h。结果表明，氧化动力学严格遵循抛物线生长定律，得到稳态抛物线速率常数（k p）为 1.83 × 10 −2 mg 2 ⋅ cm −4 ⋅ h −1。在整个服役期间，涂层表现出显著的“热硬化”效应，表面显微硬度由初始的 491 HV 0.2 增至最终的 665.2 HV 0.2（提高 35.5%）。相演化特征表现为：首先在热作用下发生亚稳区有序化（0–3 h），随后在铝贫化效应驱动下，二十面体（I）相逐渐分解为近似相（β、τ 和 λ）。值得注意的是，多相网络中相界密度和金属间界面密度的增加，即使在主导 QC 相分数下降的情况下，仍能有效维持力学性能。本研究表明，DS-AlCuFe 涂层为钛合金长期高温防护提供了一条可靠的结构演化路径。

infographic.key_insight: 爆轰喷涂 AlCuFe 近晶体涂层在 450°C 下氧化缓慢，并演化为更强的多相结构，有助于随时间保持防护性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该涂层为长期高温服役的 TC4 钛合金提供了一种很有前景的热障选择。
method: 采用爆轰喷涂制备 AlCuFe 近晶体涂层。
在 450°C 空气中对涂层进行老化/氧化，最长 250 h。
随时间跟踪氧化动力学、相演化和显微硬度变化。
infographic.evidence_signal: 氧化过程遵循抛物线定律，kp = 1.83 × 10^-2 mg^2·cm^-4·h^-1；250 h 后显微硬度由 491 HV0.2 增至 665.2 HV0.2。
infographic.watch_item: 有利的硬化伴随着主近晶体相的分解，因此涂层性能可能取决于对铝贫化和相界稳定性的控制。

title: Hot Corrosion Behavior of Thermal Sprayed Using HVAF and DS Techniques with Tribaloy-400 Coatings for Solar Energy Storage Container
authors: P. Sakthivel, G. Sivakumar, M. Manikandan
abstract: The present study investigates the high-temperature corrosion behaviour of Tribaloy-400 (T-400) coatings deposited on ASTM A516 steel using two thermal spray techniques: (i) High Velocity Air Fuel (HVAF) spraying and (ii) Detonation Spraying (DS). The coated specimens were exposed to a molten solar salt environment consisting of 60% NaNO 3 –40% KNO 3 at 500 °C for exposure durations up to 1000 hours to evaluate their oxidation and corrosion resistance. Phase analysis indicated the formation of stable protective oxide phases, including Cr 2 O 3 , Co 3 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , in both coating systems. Elemental mapping revealed that the HVAF coating retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal molten salt penetration even after prolonged exposure of 1000 hours. In contrast, the DS coating exhibited comparatively deeper salt ingress into the coating microstructure, which contributed to increased degradation and spallation. SEM observations showed that the HVAF coatings possessed a dense and well-bonded microstructure, along with the formation of thermodynamically stable oxides such as Cr 2 O 3 , CoCr 2 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , resulting in superior resistance to molten salt-induced corrosion. However, the relatively porous nature of the DS coating promoted salt-assisted oxide dissolution, leading to higher mass gain, increased spallation, and accelerated degradation during extended exposure. Comparative evaluation of both coating techniques was carried out to identify a suitable coating process and feedstock combination for high-temperature CSP applications.
venue: Journal of Materials Research and Technology

infographic.key_insight: HVAF-sprayed Tribaloy-400 forms a denser, more protective oxide layer than detonation-sprayed coating, giving better resistance to molten solar-salt corrosion at 500 �b0C.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For concentrated solar power thermal storage containers, HVAF T-400 coatings appear more durable for long-duration high-temperature salt exposure than DS coatings.
method: Tribaloy-400 was deposited on ASTM A516 steel using HVAF and detonation spraying.
Samples were exposed to 60% NaNO3-40% KNO3 molten solar salt at 500 �b0C for up to 1000 h.
Phase, SEM, and elemental mapping were used to compare oxidation, salt ingress, and spallation behavior.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that HVAF retained a uniform Cr-Mo-Si-O-enriched surface with minimal salt penetration, while DS showed deeper ingress, higher mass gain, and more spallation after 1000 hours.
infographic.watch_item: The result is specific to the tested salt chemistry, temperature, substrate, and exposure time, so broader CSP service conditions still need validation.
infographic.paper_title: Hot Corrosion Behavior of Thermal Sprayed Using HVAF and DS Techniques with Tribaloy-400 Coatings for Solar Energy Storage Container

zh-Hans.title: 采用HVAF和DS技术制备Tribaloy-400涂层用于太阳能储热容器的热腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了采用两种热喷涂技术——(i) 高速空气燃料喷涂（HVAF）和 (ii) 爆炸喷涂（DS）——沉积在 ASTM A516 钢上的 Tribaloy-400（T-400）涂层的高温腐蚀行为。将涂层试样置于由 60% NaNO 3–40% KNO 3 组成的熔融太阳盐环境中，在 500 °C 下暴露最长 1000 小时，以评估其抗氧化和耐腐蚀性能。相分析表明，两种涂层体系中均形成了稳定的保护性氧化物相，包括 Cr 2 O 3、Co 3 O 4 和 CoMoO 4。元素分布映射显示，即使在持续暴露 1000 小时后，HVAF 涂层仍保持均匀的 Cr–Mo–Si–O 富集表面，且熔盐渗透极小。相比之下，DS 涂层表现出相对更深的盐向涂层微观结构内部侵入，从而导致更严重的劣化和剥落。SEM 观察表明，HVAF 涂层具有致密且结合良好的微观结构，并形成了 Cr 2 O 3、CoCr 2 O 4 和 CoMoO 4 等热力学稳定氧化物，因此对熔盐诱导腐蚀具有更优异的抵抗能力。然而，DS 涂层相对多孔的特性促进了盐辅助氧化物溶解，导致更高的增重、更多的剥落以及在长时间暴露过程中的加速劣化。对两种涂层技术进行了对比评估，以确定适用于高温 CSP 应用的合适涂层工艺和原料组合。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF 喷涂的 Tribaloy-400 形成的氧化层比爆炸喷涂涂层更致密、更具保护性，因此在 500 °C 下对熔融太阳盐腐蚀具有更好的抵抗能力。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于聚光太阳能热储能容器而言，HVAF T-400 涂层在长时间高温盐暴露下似乎比 DS 涂层更耐久。
method: 采用 HVAF 和爆炸喷涂将 Tribaloy-400 沉积到 ASTM A516 钢上。
样品在 500 °C 下暴露于 60% NaNO3-40% KNO3 熔融太阳盐中，最长 1000 h。
利用相分析、SEM 和元素分布映射比较氧化、盐侵入和剥落行为。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告称，HVAF 在 1000 小时后仍保持均匀的 Cr-Mo-Si-O 富集表面且盐渗透极小，而 DS 则表现出更深的侵入、更高的增重和更多的剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 该结果仅针对所测试的盐化学组成、温度、基体和暴露时间，因此更广泛的 CSP 服役条件仍需验证。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba predicts the future weld-pool layout from past images and process signals, enabling lookahead segmentation of keyhole, wire, and molten-pool regions for delayed closed-loop control.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This is directly relevant to real-time laser wire-feed welding because it helps compensate for sensing and actuation delay, improving control readiness before the physical weld state changes.
method: Uses historical coaxial grayscale images plus welding parameters and wire-state electrical signals as inputs.
Combines a visual encoder with process/sensor-conditioned normalization and patch-level temporal state space modeling.
Adds horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder with physics-guided losses.
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead, with ablations showing temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness were most important.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on well-aligned multimodal signals and may be sensitive to domain shift or sensor timing errors in new welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 面向激光送丝焊接中前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 实时焊池感知对于激光送丝焊接中的闭环控制至关重要，因为传感、计算和执行器响应会引入不可避免的时延。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的丝状态电信号，预测三个具有物理意义区域的未来语义布局：小孔、焊丝和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、受工艺与传感器条件调制的特征归一化、补丁级时序状态空间建模、时距条件潜变量预测、密集未来特征预测以及运动感知掩码解码器。辅助的符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏以及细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43段序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的WeldMamba在500 ms前瞻下达到了74.63\% mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现稳健未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba基于过去图像和工艺信号预测未来焊池布局，从而实现对小孔、焊丝和熔池区域的前瞻分割，用于存在时延的闭环控制。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这与实时激光送丝焊接直接相关，因为它有助于补偿传感和执行时延，在物理焊接状态变化之前提升控制准备度。
method: 使用历史同轴灰度图像以及焊接参数和丝状态电信号作为输入。
将视觉编码器与受工艺/传感器条件调制的归一化以及补丁级时序状态空间建模相结合。
加入时距条件潜变量预测、密集未来特征预测以及带有物理引导损失的运动感知掩码解码器。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43段序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms前瞻下取得了74.63% mIoU；消融结果表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模和小孔运动感知最为重要。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于良好对齐的多模态信号，并且在新的焊接系统中可能对域偏移或传感器时序误差较为敏感。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings denser and improved wear resistance, even though friction increased.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests barrel filling ratio is a practical process lever for tuning coating integrity and tribological durability in wear-critical components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at 43% and 53% barrel filling ratios under identical spraying conditions.
Compared microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and X-ray diffraction.
Evaluated dry-sliding tribology with ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% coating showed the lowest wear rate, reaching 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N), alongside reduced porosity and better structural integrity.
infographic.watch_item: Higher barrel filling ratio improved wear resistance here, but the higher friction coefficient indicates a trade-off that may matter in low-friction applications.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层的桶体填充比对显微组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了桶体填充比对炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层显微组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在43%和53%的桶体填充比下制备涂层。显微组织表征显示，形成了致密的层状涂层，孔隙率低，Cr3C2碳化物颗粒在NiCr金属基体中分布均匀。与43%桶体填充比下制备的涂层相比，53%桶体填充比下制备的涂层显微组织更致密。X射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后Cr3C2和NiCr仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，形成了少量Cr7C3。摩擦学性能在干滑动条件下采用球-盘配置进行评估，法向载荷为10和15 N，滑动速度为5和10 cm/s。磨损体积由测试后磨痕的几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53%桶体填充比制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。最低磨损率达到1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与较低孔隙率和增强的涂层结构完整性有关。所得结果表明，炸药喷涂参数的优化会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所开发的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦磨损条件下工作的部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将桶体填充比从43%提高到53%使炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层更加致密，并提高了耐磨性，尽管摩擦增大。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明桶体填充比是调控涂层完整性和摩擦学耐久性的一个实用工艺参数，适用于易磨损关键部件。
method: 在相同喷涂条件下，制备了桶体填充比分别为43%和53%的炸药喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层。
采用显微镜和X射线衍射比较显微组织和相组成。
使用球-盘试验在10和15 N以及5和10 cm/s条件下评估干滑动摩擦学性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53%涂层表现出最低的磨损率，达到1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)，同时孔隙率降低、结构完整性更好。
infographic.watch_item: 较高的桶体填充比在这里提高了耐磨性，但更高的摩擦系数表明存在权衡，这在低摩擦应用中可能很重要。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Raising cold-spray pressure from 30 to 60 bar increased copper particle velocity, improving bonding and ductility while trading off hardness.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study identifies a higher-pressure process window for producing copper CSAM parts with a better balance of conductivity, strength, and formability.
method: LightSPEE3D cold spray copper at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar
Characterized deposits using XRD, SEM, hardness, eddy current conductivity, and tensile tests
Related pressure-driven particle velocity changes to microstructure and mechanical performance
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that higher spray pressure produced crystallite refinement, higher dislocation density, improved conductivity, and a clear shift toward more ductile tensile fracture behavior.
infographic.watch_item: The optimum window appears pressure-sensitive, so scaling to other feedstocks, geometries, or stand-off conditions may require re-optimization.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 优化冷喷涂增材制造：压力驱动提升铜沉积层机械性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种固态工艺，能够在不发生熔化的情况下制备致密金属构件，因此对于同时要求电导率和机械完整性的铜应用具有很强吸引力。本研究采用 LightSPEE3D 系统，系统考察了 30 bar、40 bar、50 bar 和 60 bar 喷涂压力对冷喷铜粒子速度、微观组织和性能的影响。通过 X 射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测试、拉伸性能评估和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷沉积层进行表征。结果表明，随着喷涂压力增加，粒子速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强了粒子间结合，并形成与严重塑性变形以及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助的机制一致的微观组织细化。XRD 分析表明，随压力升高，晶粒尺寸逐步细化且位错密度增加，并且这与延展性的改善直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶，硬度有所降低，但电导率提高，这可能归因于粒子间连续性改善以及界面不连续性减少。拉伸测试显示出明确的强度-延性转变，高压力下制备的沉积层表现出显著改善的延展性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全延性的断裂形貌。总体而言，研究确定了较高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，在该窗口内铜冷喷沉积层能够实现电导率、延展性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在控制粒子速度、动态再结晶以及 CSAM 铜构件多功能性能之间相互作用中的关键作用。本研究建立了一个工艺-结构-性能关系，将 LightSPEE3D CSAM 系统中的粒子速度、基于 XRD 推导的微观组织演化、电导率和拉伸行为联系起来。

infographic.key_insight: 将冷喷压力从 30 bar 提高到 60 bar 可提高铜粒子速度，增强结合与延展性，同时以硬度降低为代价。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究确定了用于制备铜 CSAM 零件的较高压力工艺窗口，可在电导率、强度和成形性之间取得更佳平衡。
method: 使用 LightSPEE3D 在 30、40、50 和 60 bar 条件下冷喷铜
采用 XRD、SEM、硬度、涡流电导率和拉伸测试对沉积层进行表征
将压力驱动的粒子速度变化与微观组织和机械性能联系起来
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要表明，更高的喷涂压力导致晶粒细化、位错密度升高、电导率改善，并且拉伸断裂行为明显向更延性的方向转变。
infographic.watch_item: 最佳窗口对压力较为敏感，因此在迁移到其他粉末原料、几何形状或喷距条件时，可能需要重新优化。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Raising argon flow rate from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying of NiCrFeBSiC coatings produced thicker, denser coatings with better wear behavior.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Tuning spray-gas flow is a practical process lever for improving thermal-sprayed self-fluxing coatings without changing the base alloy chemistry.
method: Air plasma sprayed NiCrFeBSiC self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings
Compared argon flow rates of 1600 and 1800 L/h
Evaluated microstructure, microhardness, adhesion, and ball-on-disk tribology
infographic.evidence_signal: At 1800 L/h, coating thickness roughly doubled, porosity roughly halved, and the friction coefficient dropped to about 0.107; microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV and elastic modulus 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on only two argon flow settings, so broader process optimization is needed before generalizing to other spray conditions or geometries.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对NiCrFeBSiC涂层结构和性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本工作采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于NiCrFeBSiC体系的自熔性金属-陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600和1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，随着氩气流量增加，涂层厚度约增加两倍，孔隙率降低两倍。根据显微硬度测试结果，显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，而弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。摩擦学测试采用球-盘配置进行。在1800 L/h的氩气流量下，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性有所改善。划痕测试结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工况下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在1800 L/h条件下获得的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂NiCrFeBSiC涂层时的氩气流量从1600提高到1800 L/h，可获得更厚、更致密且磨损行为更优的涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 调节喷涂气体流量是一种实用的工艺调控手段，可在不改变基础合金化学成分的情况下提升热喷涂自熔性涂层性能。
method: 空气等离子喷涂NiCrFeBSiC自熔性金属-陶瓷涂层
比较1600和1800 L/h的氩气流量
评估显微组织、显微硬度、结合强度和球-盘摩擦学性能
infographic.evidence_signal: 在1800 L/h下，涂层厚度约增加一倍，孔隙率约减半，摩擦系数降至约0.107；显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。
infographic.watch_item: 结果仅基于两种氩气流量设定，因此在推广到其他喷涂条件或几何形状之前，仍需进行更广泛的工艺优化。
